electricity.public_caveat: Core grid values are treated as live because the mapped source interval is within two hours.

recommended_next_source.name: Smart Grid Dashboard chart/API endpoint
recommended_next_source.reason: Needed for reliable live demand, wind, solar, generation, interconnection and fuel-mix values without visible-page scraping.

robust_api_fallback.name: ENTSO-E Transparency Platform
robust_api_fallback.note: Requires API token and correct Irish bidding-zone/control-area mapping.

items.label: Electricity system price
items.source: EirGrid Smart Grid Dashboard imbalance settlement price
items.freshness: latest settlement period visible on Smart Grid Dashboard
items.public_caveat: System/market signal, not a household tariff.

items.label: Gas balancing price
items.freshness: manually entered from Gas Networks Ireland table/export
items.public_caveat: System/market signal, not a household tariff.

do_not_do: Do not call stale workbook values live.
Do not mix dashboard percentages with workbook MW values without explicit denominator notes.
Do not treat thermal/other as measured gas.
Do not substitute household tariffs for market/system prices.
